channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why most methylene blue cases came from anesthesia, not pills [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Most patients on antidepressants are told they can't take methylene b...

item.title: Beyond GLP-1s: The next chapter of obesity care
item.description: The rapid rise of GLP-1 medications such as semaglutide and tirzepatide has transformed obesity treatment. Still, experts say medications alone are no...

item.title: Scientists engineer personalized cartilage graft for infants with life-threatening airway narrowing
item.description: A study led by researchers at Children's Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) demonstrates a new method of using decellularized cartilage with patient-spec...

item.title: Africa's Ebola outbreaks complicated by victims who prefer traditional healers over hospitals
item.description: Whenever Ebola comes, some of the afflicted choose the road to the nearest hospital. Others take the path to the shrine of a traditional healer, often...
